title: The Missing Medal
shortStory: A championship medal vanished from the locked trophy case overnight.

locations.name: Locker Room
locations.teaserText: The locker room shows signs of a struggle.

actions.label: Search the benches
actions.description: Look for dropped items on the benches.
actions.observationText: Gear was scattered {movementWord} across the benches.

actions.label: Check the lockers
actions.observationText: The lockers are messy but reveal nothing useful.

actions.label: Question the attendant
actions.description: Ask who was here last night.
actions.observationText: The attendant remembers hearing scuffling after hours.

actions.label: Measure the scuffs
actions.description: Check the size of the floor marks.
actions.observationText: Mid-sized scuff marks trail across the gym floor.

sizeOverrides.small: Small, light scuff marks near the equipment rack.
sizeOverrides.large: Heavy, deep scuff marks near center court.

actions.label: Follow the marks
actions.observationText: A line of {textureWord} cuts across the gym floor.

actions.label: Photograph the floor
actions.observationText: The photos are clear but add nothing new.

actions.label: Check under the racks
actions.observationText: The {groundWord} under the rack has been disturbed.

actions.label: Search the top shelves
actions.observationText: The top shelves are dusty but untouched.

actions.label: Listen for movement
actions.observationText: The room is quiet. No one is here.

locations.name: Trophy Case
locations.teaserText: The trophy case lock is damaged.

actions.label: Inspect the lock
actions.description: Check how the lock was forced.
actions.observationText: The lock has fresh scoring marks around the edge.

actions.label: Smell the case
actions.observationText: It smells like polished metal. Nothing unusual.

actions.label: Check the display table
actions.observationText: Whoever opened the case left traces {movementWord} along the glass.

locations.name: Coach Office
locations.teaserText: The coach recalls a strange detail.

actions.label: Interview the coach
actions.observationText: The coach is tired but clear on that detail.

actions.label: Check the sink area
actions.observationText: Even by the sink, a line of {textureWord} remained.

actions.label: Search the couch
actions.observationText: The couch is rumpled but holds nothing useful.

cookie-crumbs.title: Scattered Gear
cookie-crumbs.clueText: Training gear was dropped {movementWord} across the floor.

low-crumbs.title: Dropped Items
low-crumbs.clueText: Small items had fallen {movementWord} along the bench.

quiet-digging.title: Locker Scraping
quiet-digging.clueText: Someone heard scraping against the lockers after hours.

small-tracks.clueText: Scuffs marked the floor near the case.

sand-trail.title: Gym Dust
sand-trail.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} stretched across the gym floor.

loose-soil.title: Mat Disturbance
loose-soil.clueText: The {groundWord} near the equipment rack was disturbed.

scratch-marks.title: Scored Marks
scratch-marks.clueText: Fine score marks circled the trophy case lock.

dry-trail.title: Dry Path
dry-trail.clueText: A line of {textureWord} led away from the water fountain.

ash-scatter.title: Residue
ash-scatter.clueText: A dusting of {textureWord} settled near the weight rack.

frost-trail.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} glistened on the gym floor.

pollen-scent.clueText: The air carried a strange hint of {textureWord}.

slime-trail.clueText: A slick ribbon of {textureWord} traced across the locker room.

static-mark.clueText: A faint scorch mark blackened the edge of the locker.

metal-shaving.clueText: Thin curls of metal were found near the trophy case lock.

feather-drift.clueText: A few specks of {textureWord} drifted down near the bleachers.
